anvilcraft.ponder.anvil.text_1: The anvil is the foundation for all processing in the AnvilCraft
anvilcraft.ponder.anvil.text_2: The anvil falls from a height to complete one anvil process
anvilcraft.ponder.block_comparator.text_: When the blocks on either side of the comparator are the same, it’ll send out a signal
Right-click to turn on precise mode—it’ll check super carefully if the blocks are exactly the same
anvilcraft.ponder.block_devourer.text_1: When the Block Devourer receives the Redstone signal, it will try to destroy the cube in the 3x3 space ahead
anvilcraft.ponder.block_devourer.text_2: The Block Devourer can place the destroyed blocks into the chest back at the back
anvilcraft.ponder.block_devourer.text_3: Only a very small portion of the world's base blocks will be retained
anvilcraft.ponder.block_devourer_anvil.t: The Block Devourer can destroy larger blocks based on the height from which the anvil falls, with a maximum area of 9x9
anvilcraft.ponder.block_devourer_anvil_f: When a downward-facing block devourer is hit by an anvil, it will move down one block at the same time
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_1: Block Placer can place blocks in front of it when powered by redstone
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_2: It can also read the items in the container
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_3: If the block placer is blocked by a mob, it will not place the block
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer_anvil.tex: Block Placer can place blocks with anvil
The higher the anvil falls, the farther the blocks are placed. The farthest is 5 grids
When the placer is followed by another placer, they can share containers
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_1: When the anvil hits the spawner, it will be forced to work
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_2: But there are still constraints, such as light, number of mob
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_3: The higher the height of the anvil, the higher the probability of success
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_4: When the anvil strikes the red stone, a red stone EMP occurs, extinguishing the nearby red stone torches for an instant
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_5: The higher the anvil falls, the larger the range
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_6: Press the lead into the vault to reset it
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_1: When the anvil hits a specific block, the block is crushed
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_2: When the anvil hits the block with an item on it, press the item into the block
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_3: When the anvil hit the block on the stone cutter, the block was destroyed
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_4: The Royal Anvil can precisely destroy blocks
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_5: The Ember Anvil can melt blocks
anvilcraft.ponder.bulging.text_1: When the cauldron is full of water, it will bulge the items inside
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_1: A normal funnel can only transmit one item at a time
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_2: Whereas chutes can transfer a set of items at once
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_3: and can be thrown as drops
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_4: When the chute output position is blocked by a block, the item will stop outputting
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_5: When there is an identical set of drops under the chute, the item will not continue to be thrown
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_1: Right-click the chute to open the filter settings interface
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_2: Set it allow only diamonds to pass through
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_3: The chute will only let the set item pass through and will not absorb items outside of the filter condition
anvilcraft.ponder.cooking.text_1: Using the cauldron with the campfire to process items
anvilcraft.ponder.cooking.text_2: If there is water in the cauldron, another recipe can be performed
anvilcraft.ponder.dectruction_mode.heade: Another mode of shock: Destruction Mode
anvilcraft.ponder.dectruction_mode.text_: When a heavy iron block is surrounded on four sides by anvils, it triggers the destruction mode of shock.
Regardless of the chosen target, the breaking effect changes with the base anvils.
Hay blocks at the corners make Shock harvest crops and replant them automatically.
When the corners are logs, Shock breaks entire trees, as well as huge fungi stems, cacti, sugar canes, chorus plants, and other large plants.
For continuously growing crops, plant them one block below Shock’s plane to prevent being uprooted.
Changing the blocks at the four corners can change the destruction targets
When the base corners are obsidian, shock breaks any breakable block.
When the four sides are Royal Anvils, Shock gains Silk Touch effect.
When the four sides are Ember Anvils, Shock gains Auto-Smelting effect.
Here, stone drops cobblestone when destroyed, which is then smelted back into stone
When the four sides are transcendence anvils, Shock gains Fortune V effect.
In Shock’s base, a spectral anvil functions as a regular anvil.
When the corners are grass blocks, Shock breaks flowers, snow layers, and other attachments.
anvilcraft.ponder.get_corrupted_beacon.t: Beacons have a probability of being transformed
The bigger the base, the higher the probability
anvilcraft.ponder.get_giant_anvil.text_1: The more anvils you give to zombies, the greater the probability that they will be transformed into giants carrying giant anvils
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.header: Use heater to execute the high-heat recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_1: It requires 16 kW of power to work in the grid
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_2: The heater is now working properly
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_3: Drop some raw minerals into the cauldron...
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_4: Use an anvil or the Anvil Hammer to strike the cauldron
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_5: It will execute the high-heat recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.header: Use Impact Pile to generate Mineral Fountain
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_1: Impact piles are consumables used to create a mineral fountain
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_2: To work properly, it must be placed no higher than 8 blocks above the world’s bottom
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_3: And it must be placed on bedrock or deepslate
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_4: Then strike it with an undamaged anvil dropped from at least 20 blocks high
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_5: When the conditions are met, the anvil and the impact pile will be consumed...
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_6: and a mineral fountain will be generated
anvilcraft.ponder.iron_trapdoor.header: Use Iron Trapdoor to trigger unpack Recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.iron_trapdoor.text_1: You can use the iron trapdoor to disassemble composite items into their components
anvilcraft.ponder.item_crush.text_1: The crushing table can crush items
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet.header: Use magnet to attract the anvil
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet.text_1: The anvil needs to be lifted and fallen for processing
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet.text_3: Magnet will stop working when it receives a redstone signal
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet_magnetize_ingot: Get a magnet ingot through a hollow magnet block
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet_power_generatio: Generate electricity by rubbing a magnet and a copper block
When a magnet is pushed against adjacent copper blocks, it generates electric charges
Use a collector to absorb the electric charges on the magnet
Copper rust can affect the production of electric charges
A normal chute drops items directly downward
Magnetic chutes attract items from behind and propel them forward
When items are ejected, they're given forward momentum
anvilcraft.ponder.magnetic_chute_connect: Regular chutes still transform into simple chutes when connected to magnetic chutes
But magnetic chutes don't transform into simple chutes when connected to other magnetic chutes
anvilcraft.ponder.magnetic_chute_filteri: Right-click the magnetic chute to open the filter settings interface
Set it to allow only diamonds to pass through
The magnetic chute will only let the set item pass through and will not absorb items outside of the filter condition
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.header: Blocks around the Heavy Iron Block determines Shock mode
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_1: Changing the blocks surrounding the Heavy Iron Block can alter the Shock mode
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_2: For example, resin block can make anvils within the shock range bounce upward once
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_3: Placing Cursed Gold Blocks on the four sides can add equal additional damage to the shock damage
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_4: Placing different gem blocks at the four corners can add various types of damage
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_5: For example, Ruby Blocks can add fire damage
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_6: Sapphire Blocks can add freezing damage
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_7: Topaz Blocks can add lightning damage
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_8: Void Matter Blocks can add armor-piercing void damage
anvilcraft.ponder.mode_of_shock.text_9: Very suitable for executing tons of monsters.
anvilcraft.ponder.powered_sliding_rail.t: Without redstone signal, powered sliding rail acts like a sliding rail stop for items and blocks
But living entities like parrots are not affected by the powered rail
Items and blocks passing over will be attracted and stopped
When powered with redstone, it accelerates items and pushes blocks forward
anvilcraft.ponder.range_of_shock.header: The FallDistance of Giant Anvil determines the shock range
anvilcraft.ponder.range_of_shock.text_1: Giant Anvil falls 3m can shock an area of 25m²
anvilcraft.ponder.range_of_shock.text_2: And Giant Anvil falls 16m can shock an area of 1089m²
anvilcraft.ponder.range_of_shock.text_3: Additionally, shock damage increases with the FallDistance of Giant Anvil
anvilcraft.ponder.shock.text_1: When a giant anvil falls onto a heavy iron block
anvilcraft.ponder.shock.text_2: It unleashes a shockwave ripples outward in all directions
anvilcraft.ponder.shock.text_3: The shockwave harms any creature not wearing shoes
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_1: When one chute is connected to the output direction of another chute, it becomes a simple chute
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_2: The simple chute can receive items from other chutes from multiple directions
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_3: Normal chutes are locked by redstone signals
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_4: The simple chute will not be locked by the redstone signal
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_blocks.te: Blocks can also slide on sliding rails when pushed by pistons
Slime blocks can stick multiple blocks together to form a sliding structure
However, blocks that cannot be pushed by pistons also cannot slide on rails
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_items.tex: Sliding rails have extremely smooth surfaces that allow items to slide without friction
Items can slide infinitely far until they reach the end of the rail or are collected
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_stop.head: Basics of sliding rail stop
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_stop.text: Sliding rail stops have a powerful suction that can pull in any entity passing above it.
anvilcraft.ponder.space_overcompressor.h: Use the Space Overcompressor to create the Neutronium Ingot
anvilcraft.ponder.space_overcompressor.t: Press a large amount of metal items into the Space Overcompressor to accumulate mass
When the Space Overcompressor has built up enough mass, a neutron ingot will form
Neutron ingot can pass through most blocks, so you'll need something like end dust to stop it
anvilcraft.ponder.stamping.text_1: The stamping platform can stamp items
anvilcraft.ponder.tag.logistics_componen: Various item transfer and storage components
anvilcraft.ponder.tag.magnet_block.descr: Use magnet to attract the anvil
anvilcraft.ponder.time_warp.text_1: Corrupted Beacons can execute time warp recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.transmission_pole.head: Use Transmission Pole to transmitting electricity
anvilcraft.ponder.with_rail_stop.header: Powered sliding rail with rail stop
anvilcraft.ponder.with_rail_stop.text_1: When there's a sliding rail stop behind, it pulls items and blocks from the stop and accelerates them forward
block.anvilcraft.heat_collector.placemen: Too close to another heat collector
block.anvilcraft.void_energy_collector.p: Too close to another void energy collector
command.anvilcraft.powergrid.info.not_fo: No power grid found at position %1$s, %2$s, %3$s
death.attack.anvilcraft.lost_in_time: %1$s was lost in the river of time
enchantment.anvilcraft.beheading.desc: Increase drop chance of Wither Skeleton Skull and make other mobs drop their head.
enchantment.anvilcraft.felling.desc: Vein mining of logs and their variants, higher level increases number limit.
enchantment.anvilcraft.harvest.desc: Harvest and replant mature crops, higher level increases range.
enchantment.anvilcraft.smelting.desc: Smelts block drop (after Silk Touch and Fortune), higher levels provide chances of doubling ores outcome
gui.anvilcraft.category.beacon_conversio: Use this item to activate beacon
Use this block as beacon base
gui.anvilcraft.category.end_portal_conve: Converted when fall through end portal
gui.anvilcraft.category.mass_inject.mass: This item will be produced after total mass value injected reaches %s
gui.anvilcraft.category.mob_transform: Mob Transform in Corrupted Beacon Beam
gui.anvilcraft.category.transcendium_rec: Amount is amount of enchantments x 1
Amount is amount of enchantments x 3
The amount of enchantments is 16 or more
gui.anvilcraft.category.void_decay.aroun: Put this block adjacent to the center block
gui.anvilcraft.category.void_decay.rando: The block at center will be converted when received random tick
intro.anvilcraft.patchouli.basic_gamepla: The basic gameplay of AnvilCraft mainly includes changes caused by the falling anvil, which can transform blocks, process items, affect mobs, etc.$(br)This mod adds some blocks to facilitate early automation, including block placer, chute, etc., which can be viewed in the $(thing)Basic More Device$() entry.
intro.anvilcraft.patchouli.machine_examp: Here are some examples of machines that might be used to help you better understand the components of Anvilcraft and design your own automated production line. Have fun! $(br2) This part of the manual was written and maintained by $(l:https://space.bilibili.com/347845823)Bilibili@毛绒绒Fff$(). If you have any issues with the machines or any suggestions, feel free to send a private message.
intro.anvilcraft.patchouli.process: A general guide to the survival process, for reference only. In the case of a modpack, you will need to refer to the tasks or tutorials of the modpack itself. The mod process is not fixed, and this article is only the most general one.
intro.anvilcraft.patchouli.special_props: Items and blocks with special functions.
intro.anvilcraft.patchouli.structural_en: By building specific multi-block structures, we can create engineering machines with special functions. $(br2)$(#666666)Technology is not a rigid knowledge with only one solution, but a product that elevates us beyond the ordinary. Common people simply cannot understand our progress.$()
intro.anvilcraft.patchouli.technology_ap: The production or transformation of new substances through the Anvilcraft technology.
item.anvilcraft.amethyst_pickaxe.tooltip: Stone pickaxe quality, can mine iron ore, not diamonds!
item.anvilcraft.pill.tooltip: Pills made together with potion to achieve corresponding effects, can be taken quickly
jei.anvilcraft.info.capacitor: You can charge the empty capacitor in the charger to obtain it.
jei.anvilcraft.info.craw_claw: You can obtain this from crab traps placed in the water.
jei.anvilcraft.info.end_dust: Any falling block, except for anvils and Dragon Egg, will be converted into End Dust when fall through end portal.
jei.anvilcraft.info.geode_1: Finds Amethyst Geodes nearby when using.
jei.anvilcraft.info.geode_3: You can also find it in the Bonus Chest
jei.anvilcraft.info.geode_4: Or trade it from a Jeweler Villager
jei.anvilcraft.info.mob_transform_with_i: Right-clicking mobs with the corresponding item in its Mob-Transform-with-Held-Item recipes can force the mob to hold it.
jei.anvilcraft.info.royal_steel_upgrade_: You can find it in the chest of the village weapons smith.
Or you can trade with the jeweler.

screen.anvilcraft.structure_tool.convers: The area selected by it will be the output of recipe

tooltip.anvilcraft.item.amulet_box.line_: Right click to store the Totems of Undying on your inventory, and shift-right-click to retrieve the totems;
When holding, consume the totems in the box when needed, and after consuming the totem, you may receive a secret gift.
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.anvil_hammer: It's a hammer, an anvil, a wrench, goggles, and a mace
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.batch_crafter: Received a redstone signal and synthesized all internal items at once, with a power consumption of 4 kW
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.block_devourer:
Activated by redstone:
    Swallows blocks in a 3*3 range in front.
Activated by an anvil:
    1 block -> 5 * 5
    2 blocks -> 7 * 7
There is no inventory, and items will be inputted into the block or physical inventory behind or form falling objects behind.
World base blocks such as stones, mud, lower bound rocks, and terminal stones will not drop 100%
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.block_placer:
Redstone activation placed a block in front of this, but was hit by an anvil and placed further away.
There is no stock available and items need to be retrieved from the blocks behind, fallen objects, or physical inventory

tooltip.anvilcraft.item.hollow_magnet_bl: Attracting the anvil below, when pushed and pulled by the piston, causes adjacent copper blocks to generate charges
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.induction_light:
Lighting, with a power consumption of 1 kW
Right click on this with Redstone to change it to ripening mode
Right click on this with Glowstone Dust to change it to anti-monster spawning mode
Right click on this with Void Matter to change it to anti-animal spawning mode
The power consumption of the above three modes will become 16 kW
